Events where the outcome of one does NOT: 一个结果不影响另一个结果的事件
Events where the outcome of one affects: 某一结果影响另一结果的事件
Drawing with replacement makes events:: 与替换的绘图生成事件 :
Drawing without replacement makes events: 没有替换的绘图产生事件 :
The probability of B given that A has al: 鉴于已经发生A的B的概率
Independent — one doesn't affect the oth: 独立——一个不影响另一个
Flipping a coin twice — are the flips in: 翻硬币两次——翻硬币独立吗?
Yes — the first flip does not affect the: 是的——第一个翻转不影响第二个翻转
